creator: will@csociety.org
text:
On Tue, Nov 27, 2001 at 05:20:40PM +0100, Anton Berezin wrote:
> Actually, I would prefer to MFC BSDPAN to -stable instead.  BSDPAN
> solves this problem neatly in -current already.  I just need to build my
> -stable box with BSDPAN and live with it for a week.

Fine by me.  BSDPAN fixes all PREFIX problems with p5-* right?

-- 
wca
